sentences.target: Ich finde meinen Ring nicht im Bad.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈfɪndə ˈmaɪ̯nən rɪŋ nɪçt ɪm baːt/

translations.de: Ich finde meinen Ring nicht im Bad.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈfɪndə ˈmaɪ̯nən rɪŋ nɪçt ɪm baːt/
translations.en: I can't find my ring in the bathroom.
translations.es: No encuentro mi anillo en el baño.
translations.fr: Je ne trouve pas ma bague dans la salle de bain.
translations.it: Non trovo il mio anello in bagno.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在浴室里找不到我的戒指。
translations.yue: 我喺浴室搵唔到我嘅戒指。
translations.ru: Я не могу найти своё кольцо в ванной.
translations.pt: Não consigo encontrar meu anel no banheiro.
translations.he: אני לא מוצא את הטבעת שלי בחדר האמבטיה.
translations.vi: Tôi không tìm thấy chiếc nhẫn của mình trong phòng tắm.
translations.ar: لا أستطيع العثور على خاتمي في الحمّام.
translations.nl: Ik kan mijn ring niet vinden in de badkamer.
translations.uk: Я не можу знайти свою каблучку у ванній.
translations.hu: Nem találom a gyűrűmet a fürdőszobában.
translations.hi: बाथरूम में मेरी अंगूठी नहीं मिल रही है।
translations.pl: Nie mogę znaleźć swojego pierścionka w łazience.
translations.el: Δεν μπορώ να βρω το δαχτυλίδι μου στο μπάνιο.
translations.nb: Jeg finner ikke ringen min på badet.
translations.id: Aku tidak bisa menemukan cincinku di kamar mandi.
translations.sv: Jag kan inte hitta min ring i badrummet.
translations.ro: Nu îmi găsesc inelul în baie.
translations.cs: Nemůžu najít svůj prsten v koupelně.
translations.da: Jeg kan ikke finde min ring på badeværelset.
translations.ja: お風呂場で自分の指輪が見つからない。

tokens.explanation: 1st-person singular personal pronoun in nominative case; subject of the finite verb.
Finite main verb, 1st-person singular, present indicative; selects a direct object and can be negated by 'nicht'.
Attributive possessive determiner, 1st-person singular; masculine accusative singular, modifying 'Ring'.
Common noun, masculine; direct object in accusative case of 'finde'.
Negation particle; negates the clause (scope on the verb phrase).
Fused preposition+definite article ('in dem'); introduces a locative PP governing dative.
Common noun, neuter; object of the preposition 'im' in dative singular.

sentences.target: Er kauft einen Ring für seine Freundin.
sentences.reading: /eːɐ̯ kaʊ̯ft ˈaɪ̯nən rɪŋ fyːɐ̯ ˈzaɪ̯nə ˈfʁɔʏ̯ndɪn/

translations.de: Er kauft einen Ring für seine Freundin.
translations.ipa: /eːɐ̯ kaʊ̯ft ˈaɪ̯nən rɪŋ fyːɐ̯ ˈzaɪ̯nə ˈfʁɔʏ̯ndɪn/
translations.en: He is buying a ring for his girlfriend.
translations.es: Él está comprando un anillo para su novia.
translations.fr: Il achète une bague pour sa copine.
translations.it: Sta comprando un anello per la sua ragazza.
translations.ko: 그는 여자친구를 위해 반지를 사고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 他正在给女朋友买戒指。
translations.yue: 佢喺度買戒指畀佢女朋友。
translations.ru: Он покупает кольцо для своей девушки.
translations.pt: Ele está comprando um anel para a namorada.
translations.tr: O kız arkadaşına bir yüzük alıyor.
translations.vi: Anh ấy đang mua một chiếc nhẫn cho bạn gái.
translations.nl: Hij koopt een ring voor zijn vriendin.
translations.uk: Він купує каблучку для своєї дівчини.
translations.hu: Ő a barátnőjének vesz egy gyűrűt.
translations.hi: वह अपनी गर्लफ्रेंड के लिए एक अंगूठी खरीद रहा है।
translations.pl: On kupuje pierścionek dla swojej dziewczyny.
translations.el: Αγοράζει ένα δαχτυλίδι για την κοπέλα του.
translations.nb: Han kjøper en ring til kjæresten sin.
translations.id: Dia sedang membeli cincin untuk pacarnya.
translations.sv: Han köper en ring till sin flickvän.
translations.ro: El cumpără un inel pentru iubita lui.
translations.da: Han køber en ring til sin kæreste.
translations.ja: 彼は彼女のために指輪を買っている。

tokens.explanation: 3rd-person singular personal pronoun in nominative case; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, 3rd-person singular, present indicative; takes a direct object and a beneficiary PP.
Indefinite article, masculine accusative singular; determiner modifying 'Ring'.
Common noun, masculine; direct object in accusative case of 'kauft'.
Preposition selecting accusative; introduces a beneficiary PP.
Attributive possessive determiner, 3rd-person singular masculine possessor; feminine accusative singular, modifying 'Freundin'.
Common noun, feminine; object of the preposition 'für' in accusative singular.

sentences.target: Der Ring ist mir ein bisschen zu groß.
sentences.reading: /deːɐ̯ rɪŋ ɪst miːɐ̯ aɪ̯n ˈbɪsçən tsuː ɡʁoːs/

translations.de: Der Ring ist mir ein bisschen zu groß.
translations.ipa: /deːɐ̯ rɪŋ ɪst miːɐ̯ aɪ̯n ˈbɪsçən tsuː ɡʁoːs/
translations.en: The ring is a bit too big for me.
translations.es: El anillo me queda un poco grande.
translations.fr: La bague est un peu trop grande pour moi.
translations.it: L’anello è un po’ troppo grande per me.
translations.zh-Hans: 这枚戒指对我来说有点大。
translations.yue: 呢隻戒指對我嚟講有少少太大。
translations.pt: O anel é um pouco grande para mim.
translations.vi: Chiếc nhẫn hơi rộng với tôi.
translations.nl: De ring is een beetje te groot voor mij.
translations.hu: A gyűrű egy kicsit nagy rám.
translations.hi: यह अंगूठी मुझे थोड़ी बड़ी है।
translations.pl: Pierścionek jest dla mnie trochę za duży.
translations.el: Το δαχτυλίδι είναι λίγο μεγάλο για μένα.
translations.nb: Ringen er litt for stor for meg.
translations.sv: Ringen är lite för stor för mig.
translations.ro: Inelul este puțin prea mare pentru mine.
translations.cs: Prsten je na mě trochu moc velký.
translations.da: Ringen er lidt for stor til mig.
translations.fi: Sormus on minulle hieman liian suuri.
translations.ja: その指輪は私には少し大きすぎる。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, masculine nominative singular; determiner modifying 'Ring'.
Common noun, masculine; subject of a copular predication.
Copular auxiliary, 3rd-person singular, present; links the subject to the predicate adjective.
1st-person singular personal pronoun in dative; experiencer/affectedness (dative of judgment) with the copular construction.
Indefinite article functioning within the degree expression 'ein bisschen' that modifies the predicate adjective.
Degree adverb in the fixed expression 'ein bisschen'; modifies the adjective 'groß'.
Degree particle intensifying the adjective; forms the comparative-like 'zu groß' meaning 'too big'.
Predicate adjective; complement in the copular construction headed by 'ist'.

sentences.target: Mein Ring glänzt schön in der Sonne.
sentences.reading: /maɪ̯n rɪŋ ɡlɛnʦt ʃøːn ɪn deːɐ̯ ˈzɔnə/

translations.de: Mein Ring glänzt schön in der Sonne.
translations.ipa: /maɪ̯n rɪŋ ɡlɛnʦt ʃøːn ɪn deːɐ̯ ˈzɔnə/
translations.en: My ring shines nicely in the sun.
translations.es: Mi anillo brilla bien al sol.
translations.fr: Ma bague brille bien au soleil.
translations.it: Il mio anello brilla bene al sole.
translations.zh-Hans: 我的戒指在阳光下闪闪发亮。
translations.yue: 我隻戒指喺陽光下好閃。
translations.ru: Моё кольцо красиво блестит на солнце.
translations.pt: Meu anel brilha bem ao sol.
translations.vi: Chiếc nhẫn của tôi lấp lánh dưới nắng.
translations.ar: خاتمي يلمع بشكل جميل تحت الشمس.
translations.nl: Mijn ring glanst mooi in de zon.
translations.uk: Моя каблучка гарно блищить на сонці.
translations.hu: A gyűrűm szépen csillog a napfényben.
translations.hi: मेरी अंगूठी धूप में अच्छी तरह चमकती है।
translations.pl: Mój pierścionek ładnie błyszczy w słońcu.
translations.el: Το δαχτυλίδι μου λάμπει όμορφα στον ήλιο.
translations.nb: Ringen min skinner fint i solen.
translations.id: Cincinku berkilau indah di bawah sinar matahari.
translations.sv: Min ring glänser fint i solen.
translations.ro: Inelul meu strălucește frumos în soare.
translations.cs: Můj prsten se hezky leskne na slunci.
translations.da: Min ring skinner fint i solen.
translations.ja: 私の指輪は太陽の下できれいに輝く。

tokens.explanation: Attributive possessive determiner, 1st-person singular; nominative masculine singular modifying 'Ring'.
Common noun, masculine; subject of the intransitive verb.
Finite intransitive verb, 3rd-person singular, present; main predicate of the clause.
Manner adverb modifying 'glänzt'; describes how the shining occurs.
Preposition selecting dative for static location; introduces a locative PP.
Definite article, feminine dative singular; determiner modifying 'Sonne' within the PP.
Common noun, feminine; object of the preposition 'in' in dative singular; locative setting.
